chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 660 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 2529/22 2.For orders on office objection 3.For orders on CMA 2530/22 4.For hearing of main case. 5.For orders on CMA 2531/22 02-06-2022 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for the Petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. This Petition has been filed directly by the Petitioner challenging his rejection of the nomination papers by the Returning Officer. Apparently, in law an Appeal was to be filed before the Election Appellate Tribunal, which has not been done and while confronted, Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner was unwell. We are afraid this is no ground to bypass the remedy. Even otherwise, the election process has been completed and the Election Tribunals also stand dysfunctional after the cut-off dates, notified by the Election Commission. In view of such position, this Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed in limine with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
